llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Corporate Insurance (Specialist)
job.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
job.description: The Corporate Insurance (CLI) Specialist will serve as the gatekeeper and central coordination point for insurance related governance activities across countries. The role ensures consistency, accuracy, compliance, and clear accountability for all insurance data, reporting, and coordination activities within the CLI scope.‑related governance activities across countries. Functional Tasks (Inclusive but not limited): Insurance Governance Data Management Collect and consolidate data required for governance related insurance activities (e.g., asset values, stock values, turnover). ‑related insurance activities (e.g., asset values, stock values, turnover). Input and maintain insurance data in the relevant insurance systems and platforms. Collect local insurance policies and coordinate premium payment processes. Claims Management Investigation Report, track, and manage insurance claims. Attend on‑site visits to assess and understand damages when required. Liaise with internal and external stakeholders to ensure claims are handled promptly and accurately. Stakeholder Broker Management Manage and communicate with local insurance brokers and insurers. Explain insurance arrangements to local business units and functions. Support review of supplier or customer contracts, specifically on insurance clause interpretation. Attend meetings with external parties (authorities, customers, suppliers) as needed to clarify insurance coverage. Project Operational Support Support and coordinate internal projects (e.g., EC/AP separation). Assist in local onsite surveys and attend in person when needed. Track local projects including M A activities and construction projects (e.g., assisting insurance due diligence, arranging construction insurance). Compliance Local Insurance Requirements Identify and procure local compulsory insurance as required by regulations. Oversee procurement of servicere lated insurance (excluding HRrelated coverage) and not part of the global program (e.g., motor vehicle insurance, environmental pollution cover).‑related insurance‑related coverage)
